note_click_trails: Google Ads exposes only the landing page (the first page a click lands on). For these Shopping campaigns the Final URL comes back empty, so the page-to-page user journey is not available from Google Ads. The full click trail lives in Google Analytics (GA4) — connect GA4 to add a real user-journey view.

defs.conversion: A GA4 conversion is a count of your designated key events. In this property the only key event firing on paid (cpc) traffic is add_to_cart, so 'Conversions' = number of add-to-cart events. (Google Ads 'Conversions' in the campaign table is counted separately by Google Ads click attribution and won't match.)
defs.bounce: Bounce rate = share of sessions that were NOT engaged. A session is 'engaged' if it lasts 10+ seconds, has 2+ page views, or triggers a key event. High bounce = visitors arrive from the ad and leave quickly.

source: GA4 Data API (Google Ads linked); spend/clicks/impressions = Google Ads; conversions/revenue/ROAS = GA4 last-click
